message:
fix(core): validate schema before deferred DML fast path

Move `ensure_schema_unchanged` from the slow-path-only position back to
before the fast/slow branch. After 28e8b61a the fast path via
`supports_direct_dispatch_now()` could execute against a stale schema
if a DDL statement changed it after the statement was prepared.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
